landing.title: AI
landing.subtitle: Architecture Assistant
landing.description: Accelerate your software engineering pipelines. Describe your project requirements to instantly generate comprehensive architectural blueprints, technology stacks, implementation roadmaps, and actionable AI opportunities.

blueprints.title: Instant Blueprints
blueprints.description: Visualize modular architecture topologies using clean, interactive diagrams.

timelines.title: Agile Timelines
timelines.description: Get structured implementation roadmaps with realistic task breakdowns and progress metrics.

opportunities.title: AI Opportunities
opportunities.description: Identify where to strategically inject machine learning models to maximize product value.

input.heading: Define Software Specification
input.description: Provide a high-level description of your software idea. The cognitive rules engine will parse your functional patterns and construct an enterprise architecture report.
input.placeholder: Describe your software idea (e.g., 'I need a booking application for a restaurant' or 'A VR training suite for pilots')...
input.hint: Tip: mention real-time, payments, authentication, analytics or compliance for a richer blueprint.

processing.heading: Architecting Blueprint
processing.sub: Running the structural parser over your description vectors...

description.crossDomain: The requirements appear cross-domain, so the plan emphasizes modular boundaries and incremental validation.

hospitality.summaryStem: reservation, order flow, and guest operations

coreTechnologies.angular20: Fast dashboard and workflow UI for bookings, tables, and staff tasks.
coreTechnologies.aspNetCoreApi: Strong transactional boundary for reservations and order orchestration.
coreTechnologies.postgresql: Reliable relational model for bookings, inventory, and customer data.
coreTechnologies.redis: Low-latency state cache for lock-based table allocation and sessions.

demandAware.description: Forecast demand windows and optimize seating assignments automatically.
demandAware.businessValue: Increases service capacity and reduces idle tables.

orderAnomaly.description: Detect unusual cancellation or no-show patterns before peak hours.
orderAnomaly.businessValue: Reduces waste and improves scheduling confidence.

baseRisks.peakHour: Peak-hour contention can cause reservation race conditions without lock-safe writes.
baseRisks.dashboardDrift: Operational dashboards may drift from backend truth without event-driven updates.

baseRecommendations.transactionIsolation: Use transaction isolation plus optimistic concurrency on booking operations.
baseRecommendations.eventStream: Publish reservation and order changes through an event stream to keep clients synchronized.

descriptions.week1: Lock scope, core entities, API boundaries, and release quality gates.
descriptions.week2: Implement critical user journeys, persistence flows, and access controls.
descriptions.week3Fallback: Expand QA automation, observability, and deployment readiness checks.
descriptions.week4: Run load tests, threat-model high-risk surfaces, and finalize production rollout.
descriptions.week5: Validate multi-region resilience, on-call runbooks, and capacity headroom.

clauses.integrations: wire external integrations with retry-safe webhooks
clauses.realtime: optimize event pipelines for low-latency updates
clauses.search: tune search relevance and indexing pipelines
clauses.offline: validate offline sync and conflict resolution

projectBrief.title: From an idea to a clear project brief.
projectBrief.intro: This AI-guided intake helps clients make their request concrete before the first conversation. Not a chatbot, but a clear route towards the right scope.

form.title: Tell us what you want to achieve
form.description: Choose what the project should do. You will immediately receive a practical starting point for the conversation.
form.typeLabel: What would you like to build?
form.priorityLabel: Where should it make the biggest difference?
form.timelineLabel: When would you like to start?
form.detailsPlaceholder: For example: who uses it, which process needs improvement, or what gets stuck today?

website.title: Website
website.description: A clear online foundation that builds trust and enquiries.

portal.title: Client or team portal
portal.description: One place for processes, information, and collaboration.

commerce.title: Online sales
commerce.description: A conversion-focused flow for products, services, or bookings.

custom.title: Custom solution
custom.description: Software that makes a specific internal process smarter.

result.title: Your initial direction
result.description: A starting point you can refine in a no-obligation conversation.
result.deliverables: What fits in the first phase
result.empty: Answer a few short questions on the left. A clear project direction will appear here.

website.withDetails: A goal-driven website with a clear message and a conversion path shaped around your context.
website.withoutDetails: A goal-driven website with a clear structure, trust-building content, and a strong contact flow.

portal.withDetails: A focused portal that puts the users and process you described at its centre.
portal.withoutDetails: A first portal flow that brings information, actions, and roles together in one clear place.

commerce.withDetails: A sales flow that translates your offer and client journey into a frictionless online experience.
commerce.withoutDetails: A compact online sales experience with a clear product or service flow and measurable conversion points.

custom.withDetails: A custom solution that validates the described bottleneck first and then automates it purposefully.
custom.withoutDetails: A focused custom MVP that simplifies one important process and leaves room to learn.

website: Responsive design with clear calls to action
Measurement plan for enquiries and behaviour
portal: Core screens for the most important tasks
Technical proposal for secure data flows
commerce: Product or service flow focused on conversion
custom: Process analysis and tightly scoped MVP
Working flow for the core action
Plan to validate with real users

nextSteps.flexible: Plan a discovery conversation to sharpen goals, audience, and priorities together.
nextSteps.soon: Bring together the key decision-makers and existing information so the scope can be confirmed quickly.
nextSteps.fixed: Document the deadline, must-haves, and dependencies so we can immediately propose a feasible phased approach.

demandForecast.title: Show clients what AI-controlled forecasting really changes.
demandForecast.intro: A full client simulation workspace where multiple AI agents monitor demand risk, adapt replenishment strategy, and produce measurable business impact.

studio.title: Client simulation studio
studio.description: Configure the client context, describe the situation, and let the AI agents generate a coordinated forecast response.

brief.title: Operational context
brief.hint: Write what is changing at the client: supplier constraints, campaign plans, region expansion, service pressure.
brief.placeholder: Example: New customer segment launches in week 4 while one key supplier has unstable lead times due to customs checks.

insight.label: AI coordination status
insight.description: The simulation tracks demand pressure at {{trend}} and projects around {{demand}} units per day under current assumptions.

narrative.low: AI agents keep stockout probability near {{prob}}% with minimal intervention overhead.
narrative.medium: AI agents detect rising pressure; projected stockout probability is {{prob}}% and mitigation is active.
narrative.high: AI agents detect a disruption pattern. Stockout probability is {{prob}}% and emergency controls are deployed.

recommendations.title: AI recommendations
recommendations.expedite: Trigger immediate PO escalation and secure allocation windows.
recommendations.buffer: Increase safety coverage on critical SKUs for the next cycle.
recommendations.allocate: Prioritize replenishment to high-value channels before peak weeks.
recommendations.dualSource: Activate secondary suppliers for long lead-time materials.
recommendations.cashGuard: Use segmented reorder thresholds to reduce tied-up working capital.
recommendations.monitor: Keep current cadence and continue weekly anomaly detection.

descriptions.planner: Builds next-cycle forecast windows and updates reorder cadence from market and campaign signals.
descriptions.inventory: Optimizes stock positioning per service objective and supplier reliability.
descriptions.risk: Scores disruption exposure and deploys guardrails for stockout prevention.

actions.rebalanceNow: Rebalance replenishment immediately across top-risk SKUs.
actions.adjustCadence: Shift ordering cadence to absorb projected demand swings.
actions.activateBackup: Activate backup supplier lane for vulnerable categories.
actions.monitorSuppliers: Continue supplier stability monitoring and alerting.
actions.keepGuardrails: Keep current risk guardrails and monitor outliers.
actions.raiseProtection: Increase risk protection thresholds for next planning cycle.

events.signalSpike: Demand signal spike detected; AI increased reorder pace.
events.supplierDelay: Supplier delay predicted; backup path prepared.
events.bufferApplied: Safety buffer applied to critical inventory lanes.

business.title: Client value projection
business.narrativeHigh: With AI orchestration enabled, the client absorbs disruption without the same service collapse seen in manual planning.
business.narrativeStandard: AI coordination reduces workload and improves forecast quality, creating a reliable path to better service and lower risk.

warehouse.title: AI that orders before stock becomes a problem.
warehouse.subtitle: Run a live warehouse and compare manual replenishment with pattern-based AI decisions under changing demand and supply conditions.

ai.title: AI replenishment
ai.manualDecision: The model is offline. Stock follows a fixed schedule, next order on day {{day}}.
ai.orderPlaced: Order for {{quantity}} units placed automatically. Expected on day {{day}}.
ai.orderPending: Reorder threshold reached. The model will create a replenishment order on the next cycle.
ai.holdStock: No action required. The model continues monitoring until stock approaches {{threshold}} units.

activity.title: Warehouse activity
activity.aiEnabled: AI replenishment enabled; dynamic reorder points are active.
activity.aiDisabled: AI replenishment disabled; fixed planning remains active.
activity.order: AI created a {{quantity}} unit order for arrival on day {{arrival}}.
activity.manualOrder: Fixed planning created a {{quantity}} unit order for arrival on day {{arrival}}.
activity.risk: Stock risk detected; forecast and reorder threshold updated.

scenario.normal: Demand returned to its normal operating pattern.
scenario.promotion: Promotion signal activated; the model expects short demand peaks.
scenario.seasonal: Seasonal growth activated; the model tracks an increasing trend.
scenario.supplier: Supplier delay activated; expected lead times increased.
